title: KCD Guadalajara 2026
description: KCD Guadalajara, an event sanctioned by the CNCF that gathers adopters from open source and cloud native communities for education, collaboration, and networking.

title: KCD Kochi 2026
description: Join us for Kubernetes Community Days (KCD) Kochi 2026! A vibrant, community-led conference in the heart of Kerala. Connect with local and international experts, learn the latest in cloud-native tech, and share your passion for all things Kubernetes. Don't miss this opportunity to grow your skills and network this April!

title: KCD Toronto 2026
description: Kubernetes Community Days (KCD) Toronto is a premier, community-driven event dedicated to exploring cloud-native technologies, with a primary focus on Kubernetes and related tools within the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) ecosystem.What to ExpectKCD Toronto provides a vital platform for local practitioners, developers, and enthusiasts to converge, share knowledge, discuss the latest…

title: KCD Texas 2026
description: Kubernetes Community Days (KCD) Texas is a community-driven event focused on cloud-native technologies, with a particular emphasis on Kubernetes and related tools within the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) ecosystem.

title: KCD Czech & Slovak - Prague 2026
description: [EN]KCD Czech Slovak brings together Cloud Native tech professionals for a focused event on Kubernetes, DevOps, and cloud development. title: KCD Kuala Lumpur 2026
description: 🚀 Get ready for KCD Kuala Lumpur 2026 🚀This is the premier event for Malaysia’s cloud native and Kubernetes community! We’re bringing a full day of innovation, learning and collaboration to Kuala Lumpur.

title: Kubernetes Community Days Lima 2026
description: Kubernetes Community Days Lima, Perú 🇵🇪🎉 Bienvenidos a la Comunidad Cloud Native de Perú Kubernetes Community Days Lima, Perú es una iniciativa liderada por entusiastas y profesionales de la tecnología 🚀 con el objetivo de fortalecer, educar y ampliar la comunidad Cloud Native en Perú y Latinoamérica.

title: KCD Porto 2026 | Collab with DevOps Days Portugal
description: The Kubernetes and Cloud Native community will gather again in Porto for KCD Porto 2025—the only Kubernetes Community Days event in Iberia in 2025. Built by the community, for the community, it brings together developers, platform engineers, and cloud specialists for two days of inspiring talks and networking.
